title: Crunchy Crisp Jamaican Vine Tomatoes Roast
description: A light and peppery Jamaican dish featuring vine tomatoes, this lacto-vegetarian friendly roast is perfect for a snack or dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the vine tomatoes with olive oil, scotch bonnet peppers, garlic, thyme, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the tomatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast the tomatoes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
While the tomatoes are roasting, mix the feta cheese and bread crumbs in a small bowl.
After the tomatoes have roasted for 20 minutes, sprinkle the feta cheese and bread crumb mixture evenly over the top of the tomatoes.
Return the tomatoes to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the bread crumbs are golden brown and the tomatoes are tender.
Remove the tomatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
